un.caen.model.items

Class Weapon

  • java.lang.Object
    • un.caen.model.items.Item
      • un.caen.model.items.Weapon
  • Direct Known Subclasses:
    Bomb, Gun, Mine

    public abstract class Weapon
extends Item
    Represents an abstract weapon in the game. This class serves as a base for all specific weapon types (e.g., Gun, Bomb, Mine). Each weapon has a range, damage value, and an owner player ID.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      protected int damage 
      protected int ownerPlayerId 
      protected int range

        id, ItemCount, position, visible

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      Weapon(int range, int damage, int ownerPlayerId)
      Constructs a Weapon with the specified range, damage, and owner player ID.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void apply(Player player)
      Applies the weapon's effect to a specified player by reducing their energy.
      int getDamage()
      Gets the damage dealt by the weapon.
      int getRange()
      Gets the effective range of the weapon.
      abstract void use(Direction direction)
      Uses the weapon in a specified direction (to be implemented by subclasses).
      abstract void use(int x, int y)
      Uses the weapon at a specified position (to be implemented by subclasses).

    • Field Detail

      • range

        protected int range

      • damage

        protected int damage

      • ownerPlayerId

        protected int ownerPlayerId

    • Constructor Detail

      • Weapon

        public Weapon(int range,
              int damage,
              int ownerPlayerId)
        Constructs a Weapon with the specified range, damage, and owner player ID.
        Parameters:
        range - the effective range of the weapon
        damage - the damage dealt by the weapon
        ownerPlayerId - the ID of the player who owns the weapon

    • Method Detail

      • apply

        public void apply(Player player)
        Applies the weapon's effect to a specified player by reducing their energy.
        Parameters:
        player - the Player to apply the weapon's effect to

      • use

        public abstract void use(int x,
                         int y)
        Uses the weapon at a specified position (to be implemented by subclasses).
        Parameters:
        x - the x-coordinate where the weapon is used
        y - the y-coordinate where the weapon is used

      • use

        public abstract void use(Direction direction)
        Uses the weapon in a specified direction (to be implemented by subclasses).
        Parameters:
        direction - the Direction in which the weapon is used

      • getDamage

        public int getDamage()
        Gets the damage dealt by the weapon.
        Returns:
        the damage value of the weapon

      • getRange

        public int getRange()
        Gets the effective range of the weapon.
        Returns:
        the range of the weapon
